title: Note
description: A published knowledge-note entity for Hall of Knowledge. Canonical public source lives under content/knowledge/**/*.json — see docs/design/Hall of Knowledge — Publishing Boundary & Privacy Checklist.md for the authoring/privacy rules this schema enforces structurally.

body.description: Markdown-formatted text. A plain string field today (no frontmatter/file parsing) — see the publishing-boundary doc for why, and for how a future Markdown importer is expected to produce this same field without changing the schema.

source.description: Free-text provenance note (e.g. "adapted from personal lab notes") — never a filesystem path.
